Bachelor of Arts, Educational Studies in Special and Elementary Education
guides.reconciliation: 41 SP / 40 AoS — Considerations for Instructional Planning for Learners in SP only
guides.medium_detail: PDF text extraction reordering artifact in Fundamentals of Special Education course: bullet fragments out of order. Last bullet ends with '...the Individualized' (no terminal punctuation). The 50-char course title 'Considerations for Instructional Planning for Learners' is absorbed as bullet continuation by the parser's len(line)>30 heuristic. Course present in SP but missing from AoS. Not fixable without parser changes that risk regressions.

teacher_licensure.student_teaching_group: present in BAELED and BASPEE; absent in BASPMM
teacher_licensure.notes: BASPEE is dual-licensure (special ed + elementary); BASPMM is special ed only with clinical but no student teaching

educational_studies.notes: Secondary science variants share group patterns (Professional Core, General Education, General Science Content, subject-specific content, Secondary Education, Pedagogy and Teaching Methods, Science)

educational_studies_sped.notes: Special Education Educational Studies; share groups (Professional Core, General Education, Special Education, Elementary Education, Pedagogy and Teaching Methods). All MEDIUM due to PDF reordering artifact.

sp_incomplete_row_at_eof.description: Last SP row (Secondary Disciplinary Literacy) has CU captured but term value displaced after Total CUs by PDF page-boundary split. Course correctly present in AoS. Same pattern as BSSWE_C (cs_ug rollout).

competency_trigger_unexpected_state.description: PDF text extraction reordering artifact in Fundamentals of Special Education course. Bullet fragments out of order; last fragment ends with '...the Individualized' (no terminal punctuation). Following course title 'Considerations for Instructional Planning for Learners' (50 chars, title-case) absorbed as bullet continuation by parser's len(line)>30 heuristic. Course in SP but missing from AoS. Consistent across all 4 guides with Special Education content.

section_heading_variants: General Science Content (BAESSESB, BAESSESC, BAESSESE, BAESSESP, BAESSPEE)
Pedagogy and Teaching Methods (all educational studies)

custom_handling_required.issue: Considerations for Instructional Planning for Learners missing from AoS
custom_handling_required.note: Course present in SP. AoS otherwise complete. Downstream users should cross-reference SP when AoS course count < SP row count. Parser fix would require changing bullet-continuation heuristic — deferred to avoid regression risk.

recommendation.summary: 11/11 guides parsed, 0 failures, 0 LOW confidence. 5 HIGH / 6 MEDIUM. All MEDIUM cases are source-data artifacts (PDF reordering or page-boundary splits), not parser design failures. No parser changes were needed or made. Family is complete.
recommendation.next_family_rationale: graduate_standard (9 guides: MBA, MHA, MPH, MSHRM, MSITM, etc.) is structurally closest to standard_bs, which is the most thoroughly validated family. Likely to parse cleanly with minimal changes. Lower risk than teaching_mat or education_ma which may share some education_ba complexity.
